mnemonics.title: S.P.C.P. for IoT Device Components
mnemonics.content: Remember the four core components as: Sensors, Processor, Connectivity, Power. Think: 'SPCP builds every IoT device'.

mnemonics.title: MCU vs. MPU
mnemonics.content: MicroController = Complete & Compact (all-in-one chip). MicroProcessor = Powerful but needs Peripherals (external memory/IO chips needed).

mnemonics.title: IoT Architecture Layers - PNPA
mnemonics.content: P - Perception (sensors/devices), N - Network (connectivity/transport), P - Processing (cloud/analytics), A - Application (user services). Think: 'People Need Processing Applications'.

mnemonics.title: Connectivity Range Spectrum
mnemonics.content: Near to Far: NFC (cm) -> BLE (10m) -> Zigbee (100m) -> WiFi (100m) -> LoRa (10km) -> Cellular (50km). Think: 'Nearby Bluetooth, Zigzag WiFi, Long-range LoRa, Cellular everywhere'.
